Name: Bronzecloud Staff
Description: A sturdy bronze staff that cuts through the air when swung and is well suited for close-range combat.

Name: Folk Opera Armor
Description: A finely crafted battle robe that provides strong defense and resistance to poison damage.

Name: Heavenly Thunder Strike
Description: Summons thunder to attack enemies and deal wide-area lightning damage.

Name: Flame Dance
Description: Performs a fiery combat step that surrounds enemies with scorching flames.

Name: Wukong
PowerLevel: able to use the Seventy-Two Transformations and cloud-riding techniques while acting with heroic resolve.

Name: Silver Horn King
Description: A powerful demon king who controls magical artifacts and has very high combat strength.
